sections.label: Title
sections.guidance: Reflect topic scope and synthesis perspective.

sections.label: Abstract
sections.guidance: State objective, search strategy, synthesis highlights, and conclusion.

sections.label: Introduction
sections.guidance: Define problem, why synthesis is needed, and review scope.

sections.label: Thematic Evidence Synthesis
sections.guidance: Organize studies by themes, compare agreements and conflicts.

sections.label: Research Gaps
sections.guidance: Identify unresolved questions and methodological gaps.

sections.label: Conclusion
sections.guidance: Summarize consensus and high-priority next steps.

sections.label: References
sections.guidance: Document all cited evidence with consistent formatting.
